calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Sproul for (administrator) David Timko.

The Court stated that it has looked at the filings and is concerned regarding the effort to locate heirs. Mr. Sproul stated that the petitioner says that there are no known heirs, that they have filed a declaration regarding everyone that he knew and that he has known everyone for many years. The Court asked if counsel had anything else to offer such as more details regarding the efforts made regarding locating the issue of predeceased siblings. Mr. Sproul that the domestic partner has given the information that he has and that it would be a big expense to search. The Court asked if there were any other avenues that counsel could pursue. Mr. Sproul stated that there are none that he knows of. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Continued To Nov-30-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
